heading: Engagement of diplomatic missions of the United States
label: 8012 Engagement of diplomatic missions of the United States

children.label: A
children.text: United States officials from relevant agencies participating in the interagency Working Group identified in , foreign officials, nongovernmental organizations, the private sector, and representatives of local fishermen in the region; andsection 8031 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: experts on IUU fishing, law enforcement, criminal justice, transnational organized illegal activity, defense, intelligence, vessel movement monitoring, and international development operating in or with knowledge of the region; and
designate a counter-IUU Fishing Coordinator from among existing personnel at the mission if the chief of mission determines such action is appropriate.
